title: hebe × affinis
intro: Hebe × affinis is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Hebe elliptica and Hebe salicifolia, belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family. Hebe × affinis is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, offering health benefits such as relieving congestion and soothing sore throats. Hebe × affinis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
